tasks.task: Add config.yaml for backend service configuration
tasks.description: Create config.yaml in root directory to configure blog-service backend IP and port with extensible structure for future services.

steps.description: Create config.yaml with services.blog-service configuration
Add TypeScript type definition for config schema

tasks.acceptance-criteria: config.yaml exists in root directory with blog-service configuration containing host, port, and base_url fields. Config structure supports adding multiple services in the future.

unit: config.yaml file exists at project root
config.yaml contains valid YAML syntax parseable by yaml parser
config.yaml has services.blog-service.host, port, base_url fields defined

tasks.description: Set up API client layer with request wrapper, response types, and error handling for backend communication.

steps.description: Create src/api/types.ts with API response and error type definitions
Create src/api/client.ts with fetch wrapper and error handling
Create src/api/config.ts to load and export service base URLs from config.yaml

tasks.acceptance-criteria: src/api/ directory exists with types.ts defining ApiResponse, PaginatedResponse, and ApiError interfaces. client.ts exports request function with GET/POST/PUT/DELETE methods. All API calls use backend naming convention (snake_case).

unit: ApiResponse interface correctly deserializes mock JSON response with code, message, data fields
PaginatedResponse interface correctly handles items, total, page, page_size, total_page fields
client.ts request function correctly constructs URL with base URL prefix
client.ts throws ApiError with correct code and message on non-zero response code

tasks.description: Create posts API service module with methods to fetch post list and individual post details.

steps.description: Create src/api/services/posts.ts with Post and Tag type definitions
Implement getPosts function with pagination and filtering parameters
Implement getPostById function to fetch single post
Implement searchPosts function with keyword parameter

tasks.acceptance-criteria: src/api/services/posts.ts exports Post interface with id, title, content, summary, tags, created_at, updated_at, published_at fields. getPosts, getPostById, and searchPosts functions correctly call backend endpoints and return typed responses.

unit: Post interface accepts mock API response with snake_case fields
getPosts correctly constructs query string with page, size, sort_by, order, tag_id parameters
getPostById correctly encodes UUID in URL path
searchPosts correctly encodes keyword query parameter
integration: getPosts returns real data from backend GET /api/v1/posts endpoint
getPostById returns real data from backend GET /api/v1/posts/:id endpoint

tasks.description: Create tags API service module with methods to fetch tag list and individual tag details.

steps.description: Create src/api/services/tags.ts with Tag type definition
Implement getTags function with pagination parameters
Implement getTagById function to fetch single tag
Implement searchTags function with keyword parameter

tasks.acceptance-criteria: src/api/services/tags.ts exports Tag interface with id, name, created_at fields. getTags, getTagById, and searchTags functions correctly call backend endpoints and return typed responses.

unit: Tag interface accepts mock API response with id, name, created_at fields
getTags correctly constructs query string with page, size, sort_by, order parameters
getTagById correctly encodes UUID in URL path
integration: getTags returns real data from backend GET /api/v1/tags endpoint

tasks.task: Refactor blog store to use API client
tasks.description: Replace hardcoded test data in blog store with API calls, maintaining reactive state management.

steps.description: Remove hardcoded posts array from blog store
Add loading and error state refs
Implement fetchPosts action using posts API service
Implement fetchPostById action using posts API service
Update recentPosts computed to use fetched data

tasks.acceptance-criteria: blog.ts store no longer contains hardcoded test data. Store exports posts ref, loading ref, error ref, fetchPosts action, and fetchPostById action. All data uses backend snake_case naming convention.

unit: store posts ref initializes as empty array
store loading ref initializes as false
store error ref initializes as null
fetchPosts action sets loading to true during fetch and false after completion
integration: fetchPosts populates posts ref with real data from backend API
fetchPostById correctly retrieves single post from backend API
recentPosts computed returns first 3 items from fetched posts

tasks.task: Update components to use new data structure
tasks.description: Update HomePage, ArticlesPage, and BlogDetailPage components to work with backend snake_case field names and async data loading.

steps.description: Update HomePage to call fetchPosts on mount and handle loading state
Update HomePage template to use created_at instead of createdAt
Update ArticlesPage to call fetchPosts and handle loading state
Update ArticlesPage template to use created_at field
Update BlogDetailPage to call fetchPostById and handle loading/error states
Update BlogDetailPage template to use snake_case field names

tasks.acceptance-criteria: HomePage displays posts fetched from backend with loading indicator. ArticlesPage shows all posts from backend. BlogDetailPage shows individual post with proper error handling for non-existent posts. All components use snake_case field names (created_at, read_time removed as backend does not provide it).

unit: HomePage renders loading state when store.loading is true
HomePage renders post cards when store.posts has data
BlogDetailPage renders 404 state when post is null after fetch completes
integration: HomePage displays real post titles from backend API
ArticlesPage displays real post list from backend API
BlogDetailPage displays real post content from backend API
e2e-manual: Visual: post cards display correctly with real data on home page
Visual: blog detail page renders markdown content properly
Visual: loading states appear during data fetch
Visual: 404 page appears for non-existent post IDs

tasks.description: Add js-yaml package for parsing config.yaml file in the application.

steps.description: Install js-yaml and its type definitions
Configure Vite to handle yaml file imports

tasks.acceptance-criteria: js-yaml package installed and available for import. Vite config updated to support importing .yaml files. TypeScript types for js-yaml installed.

unit: js-yaml package exists in package.json dependencies
import statement for yaml file does not cause TypeScript error
